title: Kado - OTC follow up (if they give their name to us)

actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

 

If you wish to continue with this OTC purchase order, payable by bank wire transfer, please be sure to send your full name to their email (otc@kado.money) as well. They'll be in touch with you shortly to walk through the next steps for completing the order.

 

Message us here at Edge support, if you have any other questions or concerns.
